statements.status_notes: Go stdlib CVEs in kubectl binaries for 1.33/1.34/1.35. Go 1.26.4 merged to master (#139479) and release-1.36 (#138871). Supported-branch backports were requested; maintainer pointed to the security/patch process rather than confirming per-branch backport in-issue. Fixed on master/1.36; supported-branch Go bumps handled via monthly patch cadence. [ref: https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes/issues/139510]
